agentAssistAdminAppNameDescription.AutoSummary: CXone Enlighten AutoSummary effortlessly produces a summary for agents following both incoming and outgoing voice interactions.
agentAssistAdminAppNameDescription.customendpoint: The Custom Agent Assist End Point empowers organizations to leverage their own or third-party agent assist applications.
agentAssistAdminAppNameDescription.ccai: Google Contact Center AI (CCAI) facilitates seamless integration of the Google CCAI AI platform with CXone, empowering customers to leverage it as an Agent Assist Application.
agentAssistAdminAppNameDescription.omilia-voice-bio: Omilia Voice Biometrics provides real-time authentication of contacts as they engage with an IVR or interact with a live agent through their spoken words.
agentAssistAdminAppNameDescription.rtig: Real-Time Interaction Guidance (RTIG) empowers agents to enhance call interactions through instant suggestions and guidance in real-time.
agentAssistAdminAppNameDescription.salesforceassist: Salesforce Assist enables organizations to obtain real-time transcriptions and call sentiments directly within Salesforce.
agentAssistAdminAppNameDescription.agentCopilot: Enlighten Agent Copilot offers contact centers AI-powered assistance, giving agents personalized and instant information for better support.
agentAssistAdminAppNameDescription.expertassist: Expert Assist application offers knowledge articles recommendation to agent depending on the intent info of agent/patron.
agentAssistAdminAppNameDescription.mindtouch: Agent Assist Application will provide personalized and instant information to agents for better support.
agentAssistAdminAppNameDescription.hotword: Agent Assist Application will provide personalized and instant information to agents for better support.
agentAssistAdminAppNameDescription.nuance-voice-bio: Agent Assist Application will provide personalized and instant information to agents for better support.
agentAssistAdminAppNameDescription.suggestions: Agent Assist Application will provide personalized and instant information to agents for better support.
agentAssistAdminAppNameDescription.self-service-summary: Agent Assist Application will provide personalized and instant information to agents for better support.

agentAssistAdminApp.acknowledgeLoyaltyBodyText: Taking a moment acknowledging the caller's tenure with the organization and showing appreciation for their loyalty.
agentAssistAdminApp.acknowledgeRequestBodyText: Agent acknowledges the customer's request by expressing a willingness to assist.  This is not a greeting or How can I help you? Acknowledge request is a confirmation of the agent's willingness and readiness to support the customer beyond the greeting, e.g., Of course I can help you with changing your account Mrs. Doe, it would be my pleasure to assist you with that and get you back to your day.
agentAssistAdminApp.activeListeningBodyText: Actively responding in the conversation, and not asking caller to repeat themselves.
agentAssistAdminApp.agentAssistAppNameErrorMessage: Agent Assist App with same name already exists. Please enter a unique name.
agentAssistAdminApp.AgenAssistProviderNotPresent: No Agent Assist Application license is activated. Please contact the NICE Support team.
agentAssistAdminApp.askForTheSaleBodyText: Agent concludes the sales interview/conversation with a closing statement designed to elicit a transaction, e.g., So should we get you started on that plan Mr. Doe?
agentAssistAdminApp.beEmpatheticBodyText: Acknowledging stated issues, and their related impacts/hardships to the caller.
agentAssistAdminApp.buildRapportBodyText: Acknowledging the callers request, actively responding in the conversation, and not asking caller to repeat themselves.
agentAssistAdminApp.configChangeWarningTxt: Choose one guidance type. Changing the Guidance Type after saving will remove previous settings once saved.
agentAssistAdminApp.configChangePopupTxt: Changing the Guidance type will remove previous configuration settings if these changes are saved. Continue ?
agentAssistAdminApp.confirmedOrderBodyText: This model is used as truth data to compare against all other Sales Effectiveness models. Confirmed Order is not merely a confirmation of an order. Rather, it is confirmation of an additive unit. Confirmed Order is currently meant to include other non-revenue order types like booking appointments, which is a revenue generating event in the diverse CXone customer base).
agentAssistAdminApp.deleteAppMessage: You are about to delete this agent assist app.
agentAssistAdminApp.demonstrateEmpathyBodyText: Agent expresses interest, concern, and care when customers have concerns, are demonstrating dissatisfaction, or are experiencing a life event, e.g. I'm very sorry to hear that Mr. Doe.  I hear your concerns and my goal today is to resolve them during out call.
agentAssistAdminApp.deselectAppForStudioQuestion: Deselect this agent assist app for this Studio action?
agentAssistAdminApp.demonstrateOwnershipBodyText: Reassuring the caller that the representative understands the issue and is ready and able to help.
agentAssistAdminApp.effectiveQuestioningBodyText: Asking meaningful questions to explore and callers experience, issues, and/or opportunities.
agentAssistAdminApp.acpGeneralTabSettingsDescription: A short explanation summarising the main action in this section
agentAssistAdminApp.acpAgentCopilotPersonaPlaceholder: I am a helpful assistant answering questions
agentAssistAdminApp.acpAgentCopilotPersonaDescription: This field provides the AI system with a description and context about the agent who is assisting the consumer. In case of a blank description it will auto populate.
agentAssistAdminApp.hideAssistantTooltip: Enable this option to hide the RTIG  panel for Agents on UI. RTIG functionality will remain working in background.
agentAssistAdminApp.inappropriateActionBodyText: Denying a caller's request to transfer the contact, use of inappropriate language, other offensive acts.
agentAssistAdminApp.interruptionBodyText: Providing professional, prompt and courteous support throughout the interaction.
agentAssistAdminApp.makeAConnectionBodyText: Agent attempts to build rapport through relating and taking a genuine interest in the customer, e.g., Oh you like true crime shows...which is your favorite?  Laughter was previously a trigger for this model but that has since been removed.
agentAssistAdminApp.messagePlaceholderText: Enter message that your agent will be notified with

messageAlertConfigComponent.maxEventOccurrenceInteraction: maximum times an event can occur in one interaction

agentAssistAdminApp.messageMarkupAcknowledgeLoyalty: Mention tenure and compliment their loyalty
agentAssistAdminApp.messageMarkupActiveListening: Confirm statements and avoid asking to repeat
agentAssistAdminApp.messageMarkupBeEmpathetic: Convey an understanding and appreciation for situation
agentAssistAdminApp.messageMarkupBuildRapport: Make a connection, ask about a recent holiday or family
agentAssistAdminApp.messageMarkupDemonstrateOwnership: Inform customer that you can assist them
agentAssistAdminApp.messageMarkupEffectiveQuestioning: Probe for details of the customer’s circumstances
agentAssistAdminApp.messageMarkupInterruption: Allow the customer to finish speaking before you begin
agentAssistAdminApp.messageMarkupSetExpectations: Review what is likely to happen next
agentAssistAdminApp.messageMarkupSpeechVelocity: Speak slower so the customer can understand you
agentAssistAdminApp.nameGuideline: Name will only be referenced in Studio action
agentAssistAdminApp.overcomeObjectionsBodyText: Agent skillfully addresses objections with clear benefits to move the sale forward
agentAssistAdminApp.presumptiveSellingBodyText: Agent leverages presumptive (assumptive) technique to close a sale, e.g., Go ahead and give me your credit card and I'll process that for you now.“ Presumptive Selling is considered a subset of Ask for the Sale.
agentAssistAdminApp.promoteSelfServiceBodyText: Promoting the availability of self-service options (IVR, Website, App, etc.) where appropriate during an interaction.
agentAssistAdminApp.rtigDropdownInfoTxt: The language selection is for the Alerts and Phrases only. It cannot be changed after it's been created and saved.

RtigConfigurationComponent.BodyText: Set specific ranges to alert agents. More stuff you can talk about right here to inform the admin on how they can best pick the specific ranges per each Guidance Score.

rtigPhraseComponent.agentMessageInformationTxt: Enter an Alert Name and Message as you want them to appear to the agent in a MAX pop-up.
rtigPhraseComponent.duplicateTitle: This title already exists. Try a new one.
rtigPhraseComponent.phraseAlertsMessage: Phrase alerts will notify agents when specific keywords or phrases are used. If you want to use them, click Add Alert to create your first phrase alert.
rtigPhraseComponent.onlyCharsAllowed: Only characters are allowed in phrases key word(s). No special characters or alpha numeric words are supported in phrases key word(s).
rtigPhraseComponent.phraseConfigurationTxt: Set alerts based on specific phrases uttered by the agent or the contact, and specify what happens when those phrases occur.
rtigPhraseComponent.PhraseInfoTxt: Add in key words or phrases that you want to track. You can then select when and who says it to trigger the above alert to the agent.
rtigPhraseComponent.tagifyPlaceholder: Type in phrases here to add (followed by return to add multiple)
rtigPhraseComponent.ToasterErrorMessage1: Please fill out all the information
rtigPhraseComponent.ToasterErrorMessage2: Please fill out all the information correctly
rtigPhraseComponent.ToasterSaveAssistantError: Error occurred while saving the app
rtigPhraseComponent.ToasterDeleteAssistantError: Error occurred while deleting the app
rtigPhraseComponent.triggerTimes: Then trigger this alert after it has been expressed

agentAssistAdminApp.setExpectationsBodyText: Summarizing actions and next steps, informing the caller of what to expect and/or required actions.
agentAssistAdminApp.selectAppForStudioQuestion: Select this agent assist app for this Studio action?
agentAssistAdminApp.sendAlertsToAgentWhenIts: Send alerts to agent when its
agentAssistAdminApp.speechVelocityBodyText: Slow the pace of speech to ensure the customer can hear and understands.
agentAssistAdminApp.toasterSaveAssistantError: Error occurred while saving the app
agentAssistAdminApp.toasterDeleteAssistantError: Error occurred while deleting the app
agentAssistAdminApp.toasterEmptyGuidanceOrPhraseCollectionEr: Phrases or Configuration must contain value. Both can not be null
agentAssistAdminApp.uncoverNeedsBodyText: Agent asks questions to understand the customer's needs, lifestyle, challenges, buying reasons, and buying triggers.
agentAssistAdminApp.toasterAssistantAuditError: Error occurred while getting the app audit
agentAssistAdminApp.noAgentAssistAppAuditMessage: No data found for Agent Assist App

agentCopilotConfiguration.sentimentTooltip: Shows the current customer sentiment to the agent
agentCopilotConfiguration.summaryTooltip: Offers a brief summary of the ongoing interaction
agentCopilotConfiguration.guidanceTooltip: Suggests responses that boost customer sentiments for better interaction
agentCopilotConfiguration.overallSubcardTooltip: Allow agent to submit general feedback about the overall Copilot experience with an interaction
agentCopilotConfiguration.perSuggestionSubcardsTooltip: Allow agent to submit feedback about each suggested offered by Copilot
agentCopilotConfiguration.positiveFeedbackTooltip: Collect per-suggestion feedback for Copilot suggestions that were used by the agent
agentCopilotConfiguration.negativeFeedbackTooltip: Collect per-suggestion feedback for Copilot suggestions that were disliked by the agent
agentCopilotConfiguration.unratedFeedbackTooltip: Include unrated suggestions in the Feedback Detail Card

agentCopilotKnowledgeTab.clientKeyHint: Client key of generated server token of CXone Expert
agentCopilotKnowledgeTab.clientSecretHint: Client secret of generated server token of CXone Expert
agentCopilotKnowledgeTab.siteURLHint: Instance domain URL of CXone Expert
agentCopilotKnowledgeTab.kernelLimitHint: Limits the number of kernels returned by the Expert search query
agentCopilotKnowledgeTab.kernelThresholdHint: Sets the minimum relevance level of an Expert kernel based on the request. A lower threshold will return kernels that are less relevant for the request compared to a higher threshold.
agentCopilotKnowledgeTab.knowledgeBaseContentPresentationHint: Determines how content from public and private Expert pages is presented in KB Answer cards
agentCopilotKnowledgeTab.knowledgeBasePrivateShareableAssetsHint: Determines if private KB Answer responses, links, and images can be shared with consumers
agentCopilotKnowledgeTab.knowledgeBasePrivateResponseTitleHint: The title text that appears in Copilot’s KB Answer private section
agentCopilotKnowledgeTab.knowledgeBasePrivateResponseTooltipHint: The tooltip text that appears in Copilot’s KB Answer private section
agentCopilotKnowledgeTab.knowledgeBasePrivateResponseTooltipDefau: Response generated from knowledge base pages marked as private

autoSummaryConfiguration.aiModeHint: NOTE: for non-English languages select Generative AI mode
autoSummaryConfiguration.summaryLengthLabel: Select desired summary length (for Hybrid or Generative AI modes)
autoSummaryConfiguration.summaryLengthNumericHint: NOTE: saved summarization in CXone repositories would be truncated to 1024 characters
autoSummaryConfiguration.includeSentimentInSummaryLabel: Select whether the Sentiment appears in the summary
autoSummaryConfiguration.includeResolutionInSummaryLabel: Select whether the Resolution status appears in the summary
autoSummaryConfiguration.pciReductionModesLabel: Enable / Disable PCI redaction from summarization

agentAssistAdminApp.gcpServiceAccountDescription: Google consumer project JSON service account in Base64 encoding
